personal.preferred_title: Python Data Engineer | SQL / Data Warehousing / Citi VP-Level Delivery

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience, including recent Citi experience building regulated financial-services data pipelines, analytics datasets, reporting layers, and forecasting platforms. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PL/SQL, data warehousing, data modeling, systems analysis, ETL/ELT, testing, debugging, production support, technical documentation, and Agile/Scrum delivery. Experienced partnering with technology and management teams to improve business processes, deliver reliable systems, and support risk-aware banking technology outcomes.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and operated Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for analytics, forecasting, operational reporting, and senior stakeholder decision-making.

Built optimized Oracle-backed data models, historical retention structures, reporting tables, and query patterns to support large-scale time-series analysis, capacity planning, and enterprise infrastructure risk visibility.
Developed Python automation for data loading, transformation, validation, reconciliation, exception handling, recurring reporting, and production support workflows.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data-platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and IAM concepts to modernize reporting and forecasting workloads.
Implemented data quality checks, testing routines, debugging practices, and operational controls to improve reliability and trust in regulated banking reporting datasets.
Integrated data from multiple enterprise monitoring and infrastructure platforms into unified reporting layers used by engineering, operations, and leadership consumers.
Created technical documentation, runbooks, data dictionaries, stakeholder reports, and dashboard narratives to support systems analysis, supportability, auditability, and knowledge sharing.

Collaborated with management, architecture, infrastructure, and application teams to define process improvements, prioritize delivery, troubleshoot production issues, and support risk-aware technology decisions.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as SME for large enterprise APM environments supporting regulated financial-services systems with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built SQL, Perl, and Korn Shell extraction/reporting scripts that automated recurring performance data exports and improved repeatability of operational reports.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, technical documentation, and standards used across application and operations support teams.
Partnered with application, middleware, and operations teams to debug production bottlenecks, improve system flow visibility, and support release readiness.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and performance expectations.
Built validation and testing utilities in C++/OCCI/OCI to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, data structures, and migration routines to maintain sub-second query latency and reduce infrastructure footprint.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration-support processes to reduce manual effort and improve production cutover reliability.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows using Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, C/C++, Java/J2EE, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux.
Maintained production application/data interfaces where accuracy, secure processing, repeatability, and timely operational support were critical.
Improved billing data-processing performance through SQL/database optimization, memory reduction, throughput improvements, and production defect triage.
Created technical documentation, interface notes, support processes, and QA/release support practices for long-running enterprise delivery efforts.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Java, C, C++, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON, YAML
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehousing, data modeling, data validation, reconciliation, data quality checks, data loading, reporting layers, schema design, source-to-target mapping
skills.Databases & Warehousing: Oracle, Oracle RAC, PL/SQL, SQL tuning, stored procedure concepts, relational modeling, dimensional modeling, MySQL, PostgreSQL, DB2 concepts, Redshift, Athena
skills.Cloud & Big Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, PySpark, Apache Spark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet
skills.Systems Analysis & Delivery: Systems analysis, business process evaluation, technical design, testing, debugging, implementation support, production troubleshooting, architecture alignment, process improvement
skills.Banking & Governance: Regulated financial-services delivery, risk-aware technology decisions, auditability, access-control awareness, compliance-minded documentation, operational controls, data security awareness
skills.Agile & Tools: JIRA, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, Git/GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, technical documentation, runbooks, stakeholder communication, mentoring, project delivery
skills.Adjacent / Learning: Autosys / CA Workload Automation concepts, Azure/GCP concepts, Databricks self-study, dbt self-study, Kafka awareness, broader application-development support

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Platform
projects.description: Built an AI-assisted capacity forecasting and analytics platform transforming operational telemetry into curated datasets, forecasting outputs, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for infrastructure risk planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns for curated analytics, query optimization, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: AI-Assisted Job Search and Data Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python automation workflow using LLM APIs, JSON artifacts, semantic duplicate checks, quality gates, and repeatable rendering steps to support structured job evaluation, document generation, and application tracking.
